text: Being here, I am acutely aware of the constructed nature of space and knowledge. The first scene, a semi-formal gathering, hums with the anticipation of shared ideas and subtle anxieties of networking. I feel a slight detachment, an observer among purposeful movements. In the second environment, confronted by the bold R+D wall, I sense a convergence of intellect and creativity. Words and images mesh in a celebration of inquiry and innovation. I feel inspired, my thoughts entangled in the interplay between form, meaning, and the unending quest for understanding.
